title: Y*gov Cognitive Profiles Configuration
description: Per-role cognitive preferences for gov_precheck validation. Each agent must analyze decisions from their primary dimension first.

primary_dimensions.description: The dimensions this role must analyze first when evaluating any decision or task. Examples: '技术可行性', 'system stability', 'narrative clarity'

primary_risks.description: The risk categories this role must assess first. Examples: '技术故障', 'performance degradation', '叙事失败', 'customer churn'

success_metrics.description: How this role measures success. Examples: 'test pass rate', 'installation success rate', 'click-through rate', 'conversion rate'
